localizations.title: The Island of Doctor Goorse
localizations.hiddenObject_1: There is always something hidden in a skeleton.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Sometimes you need to take a step back to see a way out.
localizations.code_2435: By pushing on the correct tiles, a new room opens up before you.
localizations.code_4335: No it is not the correct code. These mythical animals are the sum of several animals. No penalty this time.
localizations.code_7286: The tiles open and reveal the entrance to the pyramid.
localizations.code_7289: It is not the correct code. Yellow team, are you sure of your calculations?
localizations.code_7567: The door opens. You discover a room with a plane inside. A voice is heard: "Counter reset. 10 min before takeoff".
localizations.code_75671: The door opens. You discover a room with a plane inside. A voice is heard: "Counter reset. 10 min before takeoff".
localizations.code_75672: You have managed to overcome the traps of this cursed island! Well done!
localizations.hint_97: It must have something to do with the Mayan temple's entrance. 26 symbols for 26 letters.
localizations.hint_91: The solution is the sum of two numbers. You need the Mayan alphabet for the first and the help of the sun for the second.
localizations.hint_6: You're having trouble reading the whole diary? Use a magnifying glass.
localizations.hint_11_first: Sometimes you need to take a step back to see a way out. Don't you see anything revealed?
localizations.hint_11: Keep watching the brown land then the yellow one: don't you see a figure appear? Proceed likewise with the light green land then with the dark green one.
localizations.hint_14: It's probably the way out. Everything should be clear at the end.
localizations.hint_17: It will probably be useful in another zone.
localizations.hint_18: The graffiti is symmetric. What happens if you only keep half of it?
localizations.hint_20: There are always treasures buried in the sand. You just need the right tool to find them.
localizations.hint_23: Quite practical if you can't read something.
localizations.hint_24: Have you noticed this circular shape on the pillar?
localizations.hint_26: You should be able to remove this mirror.  All you need is the right tool.
localizations.hint_29: It must have something to do with the Mayan temple's entrance. 26 symbols for 26 letters.
localizations.hint_31: Ideally, something round and heavy would fit between it's hands.
localizations.hint_34: The 4 pyramids seem to draw the path of a code. What could you put it over?
localizations.hint_38: In excavations, it's useful for removing an embedded object.
localizations.hint_46: No number is hidden on this part of the plan. However, positioning this room in relation to the others is important.
localizations.hint_51: There is exactly one symbol in common per line.
localizations.hint_56: This perfectly circular amulet could release some secret mechanisms.
localizations.hint_58: There is something missing on this sundial.
localizations.hint_61_first: The lion roars 4 times. These mythical animals are the sum of several animals.
localizations.hint_61: For example: feathered serpent = snake + bird. Count the screams!
localizations.hint_63_first: By turning each card once, and with the exact same process, can you read two numbers to make up the code?
localizations.hint_63: Do not move the zones after they have been rotated. Move instead from one side of the table to the other to see two different numbers appear. Focus on the colored areas.
localizations.hint_64: It's a huge circular object, where could you put it?
localizations.hint_69: Wait for a message from the other team.
localizations.hint_70: You need something to clean the plate.
localizations.hint_71: There is always something hidden in a skeleton.
localizations.hint_75: The sun indicates the 8, but it seems as if something is missing for finding anything with it.
localizations.hint_77_first: You nervously press the keys. The chuckle of a pixie seems to echo in the walkie-talkie.
localizations.hint_77: The graffiti is symmetric. What happens if you only keep half of it?
localizations.hint_79: The other team are facing you and you should communicate with them. The lines on the bars are the key.
localizations.hint_80: The skull magnifies the surrounding light: its left side seems damaged, as if stuck by lightning, its eyes are pointing towards the north.
localizations.hint_83: The eye of Horus tells you how to look at the word that is made by the red lines
localizations.hint_89: What do you light up at a right angle?
localizations.hint_910: The solution is the sum of two numbers. You need the Mayan alphabet for the first and the help of the sun for the second.
localizations.hint_95: A perfect position to reflect light. Although it needs to reach the statue.
localizations.hint_99: What do you light up at a right angle?
localizations.hint_111: The lines on the bars are the key. You will need to communicate with the team on the OTHER SIDE.
localizations.hint_122: 2+11+5+16=34. Be careful: an upside down 9 makes a 6...
localizations.hint_133: If you draw the way out, do you see anything appear?
localizations.hint_3: You're having trouble reading the whole diary? Use a magnifying glass.
localizations.hint_94: Quite practical if you can't read something.
